channel.title: RISE on Peter's website
channel.description: Recent content in RISE on Peter's website

item.title: Domain Registry as Startup Partner at RISE 2017
item.description: 99.99% of startups may think domain name registration as an unavoidable cost, we treat the domain registry as our startup partner. I would like to summarise how HabHub be benefited from Startup League during RISE 2017. To learn more, please visit https://startupleague.online/ or simply drop me a message. RISE is one of the major Tech conferences in Asia. Startup League has a strong relationship with RISE. In 2017, Startup League launched a supporting scheme to let startups using one of the 9 top-level domains (e.
